subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up, and it was great connecting at the conference.

I’d be glad to schedule a 30-minute call to discuss potential partnership opportunities. We can offer the following time slots, all in the 14:00–16:00 window:

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these works best for you (and your time zone), and we will send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For senior-level or specialized inquiries, please use the contact channels available on our public website, and your message will be routed appropriately.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Role]
[Company Name]
